pages.text: This is Pako the Pigeon. Pako goes, “Coo! Coo!”

blocks.text: This is Pako the Pigeon. Pako goes, “Coo! Coo!”

pages.text: She flies and spreads out her wings. She loves to fly over Namwayi and Dairine’s house as they play crisscross every day.

blocks.text: She flies and spreads out her wings.
She loves to fly over Namwayi and Dairine’s house as they play crisscross every day.

pages.text: Coo!Coo! Pako!Pako! Namwayi and Dairine love to imitate Pako. hands They spread the and house. run their around little

blocks.text: Coo!Coo! Pako!Pako!
Namwayi and Dairine love to imitate Pako. hands They spread the and house. run their around little

pages.text: One fly over day, the Pako house did not as usual. Where could she be?

blocks.text: One fly over day, the Pako house did not as usual.
Where could she be?

pages.text: Dairine, Namwayi and the cat looked for Pako in the garden, but she was not there.

blocks.text: Dairine, Namwayi and the cat looked for Pako in the garden,
but she was not there.

pages.text: They looked in the sky and they could not see Pako anywhere. This made them very sad.

blocks.text: They looked in the sky and they could not see Pako anywhere.
This made them very sad.

pages.text: Cat called to Pako: Meow! Meow !

blocks.text: Cat called to Pako: Meow! Meow !

pages.text: Cat heard Pako reply, and followed the sound. Coo! Coo!

blocks.text: Cat heard Pako reply, and followed the sound.
Coo! Coo!

pages.text: Oh no! Pako was caught in a thicket. Not to worry, I have soft and tender paws. See!

blocks.text: Oh no! Pako was caught in a thicket.
Not to worry, I have soft and tender paws. See!

pages.text: Cat gently took Pako to Namwayi and Dairine. They could see that Pako had hurt her wing.

blocks.text: Cat gently took Pako to Namwayi and Dairine. They could see that Pako had hurt her wing.

pages.text: Pako’s wing was very sore, but the girls took good care of her. With Mum’s help, Namwayi and Dairine bandaged Pako’s wing to help her heal quickly.

blocks.text: Pako’s wing was very sore, but the girls took good care of her.
With Mum’s help, Namwayi and Dairine bandaged Pako’s wing to help her heal quickly.

pages.text: Coo! Coo! When Pako healed, she flew home. But she would fly to the girls’ window each morning. The would girls shout, “Good morning Pako!” Meow! Meow!

blocks.text: Coo! Coo!
When Pako healed, she flew home. But she would fly to the girls’ window each morning.
The would girls shout, “Good morning Pako!”
Meow! Meow!
